name: feature-loader-performance-profile
description: Phase 0 feature loader (ADR 0014) — load 'performance' profile, verify the expected toggles are on, screenshot. Phase 0 stubs are observation-only; the visual output should match the all-off baseline (modulo C2 EventEmitter wiring which is a no-op gate when off but a real call when on).

commands: (() => { const all = window.__canaryGetAllFeatureStatus(); const expectedOn = ['resolutionRampAtlasBuild','splatCache','bvhAtomDispatch','eventDrivenRender','bc4AtlasCompression','silhouetteFirstBake']; for (const k of expectedOn) { if (all[k]?.mode !== 'on') throw new Error('expected ' + k + ' to be on after performance profile, got ' + JSON.stringify(all[k])); } return 'performance profile applied'; })()
